steps.title: Identify what the claim requires
steps.content: The underlined claim says the security personnel's selections amplified "a distinct perspective not typically given a formal platform." The correct quote must show that the guard's viewpoint existed but had never before been formally expressed.

steps.title: Evaluate each choice
steps.content:
• Choice A — "a unique show that spans genres, mediums, cultures, and eras...": Calls the show unique and notes affinity for the pieces, but says nothing about the guards' perspective being previously unplatformed. ✗
  • Choice B — "bringing publicity to lesser-known artifacts...": Focuses on overlooked artworks, not the guards' own perspective being unplatformed. ✗
  • Choice C — "an interpretation that I've previously shared only in small impromptu conversations...": Directly shows the guard formed a distinct personal interpretation that existed only in informal settings — the exhibition is its first formal platform. ✓
  • Choice D — "my colleagues and I partnered closely with other museum staff...": Emphasizes collaboration with professional curators, which undermines the independence of the guards' perspective and says nothing about it being previously unplatformed. ✗
That matches choice C — C is correct.
